## What this PR does
Brief description of the change and why it's needed.

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Schema change

## Testing
Describe how you tested this. Include browser(s) used.

## Schema changes
If you modified the Supabase schema, update `SCHEMA.md` and describe the migration needed.

## Checklist
- [ ] Tested on mobile viewport
- [ ] No credentials or secrets included
- [ ] `SCHEMA.md` updated if schema changed
- [ ] `README.md` updated if setup or features changed
